final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original surrealist dream-scene illustration (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "超现实主义" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Salvador Dalí's melting-object iconography, René Magritte's philosophical visual paradoxes, 1970s surrealist science-fiction book cover illustration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a grand, vertically expansive composition with multiple surreal elements layered across sky and sea — exact framing and depth arrangement is yours
Subject: must include all of the following surreal elements:
  - a colossal moon rising from the ocean surface
  - whales flying through the sky
  - melting clocks
  - a staircase ascending into the clouds
Scene/backdrop: must include an ocean surface below and a vast sky above, merging into a dreamlike space
Lighting/mood: needs a philosophical, visually striking atmosphere with dreamlike luminosity — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking depth and otherworldliness — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a painterly or rendered surface treatment — exact medium weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid: must avoid generic fantasy clichés; must avoid flat or cartoonish rendering that undercuts the philosophical weight
